subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Abhá Kingdom! In this age and dispensation, when the holy fragrances of the Cause of God are wafting over both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی در این عهد و عصر که نفحات قدس امر الله در شرق و غرب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause
